article.title: Is Chrome’s 4GB “weights.bin” file spyware? The truth behind the viral warnings
article.summary: TL;DR Users noticed Google Chrome silently downloading a 4GB file called “weights.bin” in the background, sparking privacy concerns. This file actually helps run Gemini Nano on-device, improving privacy by processing AI requests locally rather than sending data to the cloud. Users frustrated by the storage hit can stop the downloads by disabling specific Chrome flags before deleting the model folder. You may have recently seen viral PSAs floating around social media, such as this PSA thread by X user Pirat_Nation, warning that Google Chrome is silently downloading massive amounts of AI bloatware onto your computer. Some of these viral posts rely on fearmongering for engagement farming: While there’s some truth to the situation, there’s also a whole lot of context and nuance you should be a
article.title_zh: Chrome 的 4GB「weights.bin」檔案是間諜軟體嗎？病毒警告背後的真相
article.summary_zh: 用戶注意到 Google Chrome 在背景默默下載名為「weights.bin」的 4GB 檔案，引發隱私疑慮，但該檔案實際上幫助 Gemini Nano 在裝置上執行，透過本地處理 AI 請求而非發送資料到雲端來改善隱私。

article.title: This carrier found a way to charge you $40 despite the ban on activation fees
article.summary: Credit: Megan Ellis / Android Authority TL;DR Bell has introduced a $40 “device handling fee” to replace the connection fees recently banned by regulators. Interestingly, smartwatches are currently exempt from the “handling” tax. The carrier has warned that the fee amount is subject to change. It seemed like Canadian carriers were finally moving away from activation fees , but Bell has found a new way to keep charging customers. After a recent regulatory change that banned the usual connection fee, Bell has introduced a new charge called the device handling fee. Following a recent ruling from the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) banning activation and connection fees, Bell Canada has quietly introduced a new $40 “device handling charge” for customers buyin
article.title_zh: 這家電信商找到了一種方式在禁止啟用費後仍向你收取40美元
article.summary_zh: Bell推出了40美元的「設備處理費」來替代最近被監管機構禁止的連接費。

article.title: Huawei and ZTE bans in Europe will trigger response, China warns
article.summary: China's government brands the EU's proposed new Cybersecurity Act as protectionism, inviting charges of hypocrisy.
article.title_zh: 華為和中興在歐洲禁令將引發回應，中國警告
article.summary_zh: 中國政府將歐盟提議的新網路安全法案定性為保護主義，招致虛偽指控。

article.title: 躲關稅與反中制裁，Rivian 打算在美國自製光達
article.summary: 美國電動車新創 Rivian 這兩年都在跟成本和產能奮鬥，為了進一步掌控供應鏈並壓低成本，執行長斯卡林傑表示， […]
article.title_zh: 躲關稅與反中制裁，Rivian 打算在美國自製光達
article.summary_zh: 美國電動車新創 Rivian 這兩年都在跟成本和產能奮鬥，為了進一步掌控供應鏈並壓低成本，執行長斯卡林傑表示， […]

article.title: Google Chrome 'silently' downloads 4GB AI model to your device without permission, report claims — researcher says practice may violate EU law, waste thousands of kilowatts of energy
article.summary: Security researcher says that Google is likely in violation of EU law and wasting thousands upon thousands of kilowatts.
article.title_zh: Google Chrome「悄然」將 4GB AI 模型下載到您的設備而不獲得權限，報告稱——研究人員表示此做法可能違反歐盟法律，浪費數千千瓦電力
article.summary_zh: 安全研究人員表示 Google 可能違反歐盟法律並浪費大量電力。

article.title: Google’s latest trick gets Gemma 4 running 3x faster right on your phone
article.summary: Credit: Google TL;DR Google has introduced new assistant models, called “drafters,” that could significantly speed up Gemma 4. Drafters work by predicting sections of prompts to the main model, which can focus on processing them in bigger batches. This allows the model to use the memory and the compute more efficiently. Google’s recently launched Gemma 4 edge AI models are especially designed to run locally on consumer-hosted hardware. While favorable from a privacy standpoint, local models can easily hog resources and slow down results, rendering them ineffective. So, Google is now offering a potential solution, which it claims can speed up Gemma 4 models by up to three times. Google recently released Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) drafters for Gemma 4. These drafters are essentially smalle
article.title_zh: Google的最新技巧讓Gemma 4在你的手機上運行速度快3倍
article.summary_zh: Google推出了新的助理模型「草稿者」，可顯著加快Gemma 4的速度，通過預測提示部分提高處理效率。

article.title: Google rolling out a really vibrant Search Live redesign
article.summary: After refreshing AI Mode’s interface , Google is now rolling out a fullscreen redesign for Search Live that is quite vibrant. more…
article.title_zh: Google 推出高度鮮豔的 Search Live 全新設計
article.summary_zh: 在刷新 AI Mode 介面後，Google 現正推出 Search Live 的全螢幕重新設計，視覺效果更加鮮豔。

article.title: Biggest US Grid Must Redesign to Cope With AI Boom, CEO Says
article.summary: The biggest US power grid needs a revamp to cope with the unprecedented surge in electricity demand stemming from the data-center boom, said Chief Executive Officer David Mills.
article.title_zh: 美國最大電網必須重新設計以應對 AI 熱潮，執行長表示
article.summary_zh: 美國最大電網執行長 David Mills 表示，該電網需要進行大幅翻新以應對數據中心熱潮帶來的前所未有的電力需求激增。

article.title: Google's Gemma 4 AI models get 3x speed boost by predicting future tokens
article.summary: Google launched its Gemma 4 open models this spring, promising a new level of power and performance for local AI. Google's take on edge AI could be getting even faster already with the release of Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) drafters for Gemma. Google says these experimental models leverage a form of speculative decoding to take a guess at future tokens, which can speed up generation compared to the way models generate tokens on their own. The latest Gemma models are built on the same underlying technology that powers Google's frontier Gemini AI, but they're tuned to run locally. Gemini is optimized to run on Google's custom TPU chips , which operate in enormous clusters with super-fast interconnects and memory. A single high-power AI accelerator can run the largest Gemma 4 model at full p
article.title_zh: Google 的 Gemma 4 AI 模型通過預測未來令牌獲得 3 倍速度提升
article.summary_zh: Google 今年春季發布 Gemma 4 開放模型，Multi-Token Prediction 草稿器的發佈已進一步加快其速度，利用先進的令牌預測技術。

article.title: Amazon Photos challenges Google Photos with fresh redesign
article.summary: Credit: Amazon TL;DR Amazon has rolled out a redesign for its Photos app. The update introduces a curated carousel of memories at the top of the screen, brings “On This Day” to the carousel, and makes it easier to find photos with natural language. The update is out of iOS and will come to Android at a later date. Google Photos is a great app, but it’s not the only photo gallery available on mobile. There are plenty of alternatives, like Simple Gallery, Fossify Gallery, and Amazon Photos. Speaking of Amazon Photos, the online retail giant just gave its app a big redesign. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Amazon Photos 通過全新重新設計挑戰 Google Photos
article.summary_zh: Amazon 推出了其 Photos 應用的重新設計，在屏幕頂部引入了策劃的回憶輪播，將「On This Day」功能添加到輪播中，並使用自然語言查找照片更容易。

article.title: AI has a sprawling data problem. Airbyte has just  launched a tool to fix it.
article.summary: Airbyte on Tuesday launched Airbyte Agents, a new service that precomputes and indexes a company’s business data, allowing AI agents to query it directly rather than multiple APIs at runtime. The core idea behind the launch is that the limiting factor for running agents in production isn’t the models or even the harness around them. It’s the underlying data. When agents are wired up to call live APIs across half a dozen SaaS tools to answer a single question, the result is high latency and bloated token spend. When agents are wired up to call live APIs across half a dozen SaaS tools to answer a single question, the result is high latency and bloated token spend. Airbyte Agents is built around what the company calls the Context Store. Instead of letting an agent query acro
article.title_zh: AI 面臨龐大的資料問題。Airbyte 剛推出解決方案工具
article.summary_zh: Airbyte 週二推出 Airbyte Agents，這是一項新服務，可預先計算並索引公司的業務資料，讓 AI 代理直接查詢而無需在執行時間調用多個 API。

article.title: AMD to broaden and specialize EPYC CPUs, already working on Zen 7 architecture — increased customization to better address evolving AI and cloud needs
article.summary: AMD plans to expand its portfolio of CPUs for data centers that will be targeted at different workloads.
article.title_zh: AMD 將擴展和專業化 EPYC CPU，已在開發 Zen 7 架構——增加定制化以更好地滿足不斷變化的 AI 和雲端需求
article.summary_zh: AMD 計劃擴展其數據中心 CPU 產品組合，針對不同的工作負載進行優化。

article.title: Denmark presses pause on new data center grid connections as total requests hit 60 GW — Nordic nation is the latest to put the brakes on AI buildouts
article.summary: Denmark's Energinet grid operator has pressed pause on new connection requests in the country as potential new data centers and other installations put total demands of up to 60 GW on its docket.
article.title_zh: 丹麥暫停新數據中心電網連接，因為總請求達到 60 GW——這個北歐國家是最新暫停 AI 建設的國家
article.summary_zh: 丹麥的 Energinet 電網運營商已暫停該國的新連接請求，因為潛在的新數據中心和其他設施在其待辦事項中提出了最高 60 GW 的總需求。

article.title: Anthropic Unveils AI Agents for Financial Services Tasks
article.summary: Anthropic has unveiled a set of new artificial intelligence agents designed to handle a broader mix of financial services tasks, part of the company’s push to win over Wall Street. Bloomberg's Avril Hong reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.summary_zh: Anthropic推出新的人工智能代理，用於處理更廣泛的金融服務任務，作為該公司爭取華爾街青睞的努力之一。
